commands.review_summary:
The PR adds six primary QA scorecard coverage IDs to existing scenarios and adds an `includeAllCategories` taxonomy profile flag so the release profile resolves all taxonomy categories.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +8, Other -8. Total +12 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is QA scorecard metadata, not a user bug. The reviewable check is source inspection of PR-head taxonomy/scenario metadata against the current scorecard report and QA profile consumers.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; the remaining action is protected maintainer review plus normal check gating, not a narrow patch defect.

target.title: Add smoke-ci primary scorecard evidence
target.body:
## Summary
- add primary smoke-ci scorecard evidence links for six high-value already-covered behaviors
- cover Control UI bootstrap, cron RPC/announce delivery, protected Prometheus scrape, media generation persistence, and thread placement
- make the `release` QA profile include the full taxonomy via `includeAllCategories: true`, while keeping `smoke-ci` as the deterministic PR subset
- keep this as metadata/reporting coverage wiring; no release gate is added

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-packs.test.ts`
- `node --import tsx scripts/qa-coverage-report.ts --json`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scorecard-taxonomy.ts qa/scenarios/ui/control-ui-qa-channel-image-roundtrip.yaml qa/scenarios/scheduling/cron-one-minute-ping.yaml qa/scenarios/runtime/docker-prometheus-smoke.yaml qa/scenarios/media/image-generation-roundtrip.yaml qa/scenarios/channels/thread-follow-up.yaml`
- `git diff --check`

## Coverage impact
- unknown taxonomy coverage IDs remain `0`
- `smoke-ci`: `89 / 214` primary coverage IDs fulfilled (`41.6%`), `71` missing-primary warnings
- `release`: all `281 / 281` taxonomy categories selected; `104 / 1676` taxonomy features fulfilled (`6.2%`)
- `release` has no category gaps and includes every `smoke-ci` category by construction
- full release scorecard debt is now visible: `1804` validation warnings, including `1572` missing-primary warnings and `232` categories with no primary evidence yet

## Review notes
- kept `dangerous-tool-safeguards` unclaimed because the existing denial scenario does not attempt a dangerous tool
- kept `image-and-pdf-input-routing` unclaimed because the existing media scenario only proves image attachment routing, not PDF routing
target.author: romneyda
